svg.content: <mxGraphModel adaptiveColors="auto"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="title" value="Phase 10 — Replay-to-Live Strategy Execution" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontColor=#e0e8f0;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="12" width="1400" height="32" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="kernel" value="Live Nautilus host — NautilusKernel (per run)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#3a5a8a;verticalAlign=top;fontColor=#9cc0f0;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="48" y="636" width="1400" height="170" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="key" value="<b>KEY IDEA — one Strategy subclass, no mode branching</b><br>engine injects self.clock / self.cache / self.msgbus at Trader.register(). Replay feeds EXTERNAL catalog Bars; Live feeds INTERNAL aggregation Bars — same Bar type &amp; BarSpecification, only aggregation_source differs." style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#6a5a2a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="70" width="1420" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="ui_promote" value="<b>Promote to Live + Safety Rails modal</b><br>pre-flight: logged-in + mode + saved + limits<br>Confirm → Register → SetExecutionMode(LiveAuto) → Start<br>± steppers (0 = OFF) · Replay KPI summary" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="182" width="450" height="116" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="ui_runpanel" value="<b>Live Run Panel</b><br>status (color) · strategy/run id · started<br>telemetry: realized/unrealized PnL · o:n f:m<br>[Pause] / [Resume] / [Stop] (state-gated)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="510" y="182" width="450" height="116" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="ui_orders" value="<b>OrdersPanel — strategy_id filter</b><br>cycle: All / Manual / Strategy: LIVE-{run}<br>filter on OrderEvent.strategy_id / LiveOrder<br>non-empty wins · empty never clears known id" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="980" y="182" width="480" height="116" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="grpc" value="<b>gRPC — unary RPCs (DataEngine)</b><br>RegisterLiveStrategy · StartLiveStrategy<br>Stop · Pause · Resume · GetLiveStrategyStatus<br>ListLiveStrategies<br>token-gated; Start requires ExecutionMode==LiveAuto" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="348" width="450" height="150" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="host" value="<b>LiveStrategyHost + state machine</b><br>IDLE→LOADING→READY→RUNNING→(PAUSED)<br>→STOPPING→STOPPED / ↘ERROR<br>PAUSE = new-order gate (callbacks continue)<br>ERROR → cancel in-flight of THIS StrategyId" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#3a6a4a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="510" y="348" width="450" height="150" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="registry" value="<b>RunRegistry + StrategyRegistry</b><br>RunRegistry: single active auto run<br>(strategy_id, instrument_id) dup guard<br>StrategyId → run_id reverse index<br>StrategyRegistry: strategy_id = strat-{sha256[:16]}" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#4a3a6a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="980" y="348" width="480" height="150" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="events" value="<b>SubscribeBackendEvents — single channel · BackendEvent oneof</b><br>LiveStrategyEvent · SafetyRailViolation · StrategyLogMessage · LiveStrategyTelemetry · OrderEvent.strategy_id" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0c1426;strokeColor=#3a5a8a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="540" width="1420" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="k_trader" value="<b>Trader + Strategy</b><br>add_strategy() · register() injects clock/cache<br>StrategyId forced to LIVE-{run}<br>Strategy.on_bar(Bar) — env-agnostic" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="60" y="678" width="330" height="116" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="k_data" value="<b>LiveDataEngine</b><br>internal aggregation (INTERNAL)<br>TimeBarAggregator.handle_trade_tick<br>→ confirmed Bar → on_bar" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="410" y="678" width="330" height="116" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="k_exec" value="<b>LiveExecutionEngine</b><br>NautilusVenueExecClient (LiveExecutionClient)<br>→ OrderingVenueAdapter → venue<br>submit/cancel/modify · account seed" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="760" y="678" width="330" height="116" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="k_risk" value="<b>LiveRiskEngine + safety_rails.py</b><br>native: max_notional_per_order,<br>max_order_submit_rate (pre-trade deny)<br>custom: max_position / allowed_instruments;<br>max_daily_loss (post-trade → ERROR)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#3a6a4a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="1110" y="678" width="330" height="116" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="backtest" value="<b>Replay — BacktestEngine</b><br>catalog OHLCV → Nautilus Bar<br>EXTERNAL aggregation_source<br>(unchanged in Phase 10)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#5a6a3a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="60" y="858" width="300" height="110" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="runner" value="<b>LiveRunner (Phase 8 + Step 8)</b><br>adapter → aggregator → LiveEventBus (UI)<br>+ tick tap (Step 8)<br>+ 1s partial bar push (Step 8)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#5a6a3a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="390" y="858" width="360" height="110" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="dataclient" value="<b>NautilusVenueDataClient</b><br>feed_trades_update(TradesUpdate)<br>→ TradeTick → _handle_data()<br>(register BEFORE kernel.start)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1c2030;strokeColor=#2a3a5a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="780" y="858" width="320" height="110" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="venue" value="<b>Venue + OrderingVenueAdapter</b><br>Tachibana EC trades (real ticks)<br>kabu board CurrentPrice (no trade tick)<br>Demo / Verify / Prod" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#101a14;strokeColor=#5a6a3a;fontColor=#c8d4e6;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="1130" y="858" width="310" height="110" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e0" value="Register/Start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5a8fd0;fontColor=#5a8fd0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui_promote" target="grpc"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="drive" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5a8fd0;fontColor=#5a8fd0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="grpc" target="host"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" value="register/lookup" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5a8fd0;fontColor=#5a8fd0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="host" target="registry"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" value="attach()" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5a8fd0;fontColor=#5a8fd0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="host" target="k_trader"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" value="submit_order" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5a8fd0;fontColor=#5a8fd0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="k_trader" target="k_exec"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" value="rails gate" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5a8fd0;fontColor=#5a8fd0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="k_risk" target="k_exec"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e6" value="order" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5a8fd0;fontColor=#5a8fd0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="k_exec" target="venue"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e7" value="ticks" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5fae7a;fontColor=#5fae7a;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="venue" target="runner"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e8" value="tick tap" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="runner" target="dataclient"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e9" value="TradeTick" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="dataclient" target="k_data"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e10" value="Bar" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="k_data" target="k_trader"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e11" value="Bar (EXTERNAL)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#d6b656;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="backtest" target="k_trader"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e12" value="partial Kline 1s" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#7a6ab0;fontColor=#7a6ab0;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="runner" target="ui_orders"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e13" value="lifecycle/telemetry" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5fae7a;fontColor=#5fae7a;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="host" target="events"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e14" value="push" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5fae7a;fontColor=#5fae7a;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="events" target="ui_runpanel"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e15" value="OrderEvent" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#5fae7a;fontColor=#5fae7a;fontSize=9;endArrow=block;" edge="1" parent="1" source="events" target="ui_orders"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>
svg.text: Strategy 自動発注経路 — bar 供給 (Step 8 本丸) / Safety Rails / RunRegistry / Promote-to-Live / Live Run telemetry
Live Nautilus host — NautilusKernel (python/engine/live/, per run)
KEY IDEA — one Strategy subclass, no mode branching

engine injects self.clock / self.cache / self.msgbus at Trader.register(). Replay feeds EXTERNAL catalog Bars; Live feeds INTERNAL aggregation Bars — same Bar type & BarSpecification, only aggregation_source differs.
Promote to Live + Safety Rails modal
non-empty wins · empty never clears known id
ERROR → cancel in-flight of THIS StrategyId
凡例: 青実線 = command/request · 緑実線 = event/push · 橙実線 = bar/tick データ供給 · 紫破線 = UI 専用 partial bar。Step 8 で結線: Live tick → TradeTick → INTERNAL aggregation → on_bar。
